title: Settings
language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the interface language. The change is applied immediately.
analytics.title: Anonymous analytics
analytics.description: To understand which features are used and prioritise improvements, LeetVault sends anonymous metrics (events such as opening the app, creating a problem, completing a review session). Titles, code, notes and personal data are never sent.
analytics.toggleHint: You can disable this at any time. The change takes effect immediately.
analytics.notConfigured: This build has no PostHog key configured — no event is sent even if the toggle is on.
analytics.anonymousIdHint: Generated when LeetVault was installed. Unique per installation, not linked to any account.
